overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the colorful medieval fantasy village of Toussaint on a bright sunny day. The character navigates cobblestone streets, passes under stone archways, and moves through bustling village areas with distinctive half-timbered architecture and vibrant turquoise skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone village street approaching stone archway

events.description: passes under the first stone archway into a more open area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street toward a stone archway, passing wooden fences and stone walls

notable_agents.action: villager walking in the opposite direction along the stone wall

entered.detail: wooden fence with vertical posts running along the right side of the path
large stone archway with brick detailing forming a tunnel entrance
distinctive half-timbered tower with yellow plaster and dark wooden beams
mature olive tree with gnarled trunk providing shade over the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunlit cobblestone street lined with a wooden fence on the right and stone walls on the left. The camera follows Geralt as he walks toward a large stone archway, passing under it around the 10-second mark. A distinctive yellow tower building becomes visible in the distance, and sparse villagers walk about the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path with view of distant lake and mountains

events.description: exits the covered archway into an open area with a view of the waterfront and distant mountains
slight turn to the right while approaching a set of stone stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path with a panoramic view of the waterfront, passing by stone stairs on the right

notable_agents.action: elderly villager with a walking stick approaching from the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall blue cylindrical tower with an orange conical roof visible against the waterfront
wide stone staircase ascending to a higher terrace on the right side
distant view of a lake or sea with mountains visible on the horizon under turquoise sky

segments.scene_description: After passing through the archway, the scene opens up to reveal a stunning waterfront view with a blue tower and distant mountains. The character walks along a cobblestone path with stone stairs ascending on the right. The yellow tower building now appears on the left as the perspective shifts, and villagers walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorful village center with timber-framed houses and market stalls

events.description: passes under the second stone archway into a shaded corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the bustling village center past colorful blue and orange buildings, approaching a stone archway

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress carrying a basket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: vibrant blue plaster building with white timber framing and flower boxes
bright orange building with terracotta roof tiles visible behind a wall
wooden market stalls with awnings displaying goods along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the vibrant village center with colorful blue and orange buildings lining the street. The crowd density increases with villagers walking in the same direction. Around 40 seconds, the character passes under a second stone archway, transitioning from the open street into a more enclosed passage with market stalls visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: market square with wooden stalls and carts under archway

events.description: emerges from the stone archway into an open market square with wooden stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the market square past wooden carts and stalls, navigating around villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in a red shirt walking across the path from left to right

entered.detail: wooden market cart with wheels parked near the stone wall
traditional half-timbered house with white plaster and dark wooden beams
market stall with a wooden canopy roof displaying yellow pottery

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character emerging from the archway into a bustling market square filled with wooden carts, market stalls with awnings, and scattered villagers. The area features traditional timber-framed houses and various market goods on display. The character continues walking through the cobblestone square as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval village that transitions from quiet residential streets into a bustling market square. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with wooden fences and stone walls, following Geralt as he passes under a large stone archway toward a distant yellow tower. As the camera emerges from the arch, the scene opens into a wide waterfront vista featuring a blue tower and distant mountains, with the path shifting past ascending stone stairs and wandering villagers. The perspective then moves into the vibrant village center among colorful blue and orange buildings and an increasing crowd before passing under a second stone archway. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosed passage into a lively market square filled with timber-framed houses, wooden carts, and awnings over various market stalls.
